Soil/Rock Description: Concrete with cobbles and gravels of moderately decomposed granite.

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, finely to medium to coarse grained GRANITE with moderately close to very close, narrow to extremely narrow, rough planar and non-planar chlorite and chlorite stained joints, dipping 10°-20°, 40°-50°, 70°-80°.
